name: Glade Flappy State
description: Initialize and update flappy avatar + obstacles + keyboard flags
code: (function(){var w=dimensionContext.width,h=dimensionContext.height; if(!state.flappy){state.flappy={x:w*0.25,y:h*0.5,vy:0,alive:true,score:0,t:0};} if(!state.pipes){state.pipes=[];} if(!state.keys){state.keys={space:false,jump:false,help:false};} var k=state.keys; var km=keyboardManager; if(km){var pressed=km.getPressedKeys?km.getPressedKeys():[];var set={};for(var i=0;i<pressed.length;i++){set[pressed[i].toLowerCase()]=true;}var wasSpace=k.space; k.space=!!(set[' ']||set['space']||set['arrowup']); k.jump=!wasSpace && k.space; var wasHelp=k.help; k.help=!!set['h']; if(!wasHelp && k.help){state.showHelp=!state.showHelp;} if(set['escape']){state.showHelp=false;} } var f=state.flappy; if(!f.alive){return state;} f.t++; var g=0.35; f.vy+=g; if(state.keys.jump){f.vy=-5.2;} f.y+=f.vy; if(f.y<0)f.y=0; if(f.y>h)f.y=h; var pipes=state.pipes; var spawnEvery=90; if(f.t%spawnEvery===0){var gap=120, minY=80, maxY=h-80-gap; var topY=minY+Math.random()*(maxY-minY); pipes.push({x:w+40,top:topY,bottom:topY+gap,width:70,passed:false}); } for(var i=0;i<pipes.length;i++){pipes[i].x-=3.2;} while(pipes.length && pipes[0].x+pipes[0].width< -40){pipes.shift();} for(var j=0;j<pipes.length;j++){var p=pipes[j]; if(!p.passed && p.x+ p.width < f.x){p.passed=true; f.score++;} if(f.x>p.x-20 && f.x<p.x+p.width+4){ if(f.y<p.top || f.y>p.bottom){f.alive=false;}} } if(f.y>=h-4){f.alive=false;} state.flappy=f; state.pipes=pipes; return state; })();
